falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The market closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this key technical level would invalidate the bottom pattern similarity and suggest a confirmed trend reversal, disproving the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank intervenes with a rate cut exceeding 50 basis points within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would create observable market distortion, proving the current HOLD signal is incorrect by introducing a new, falsifiable catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
